title: Prenatal Smoking Exposures and Epigenome-Wide Methylation in Newborn Blood.
snippet: : Maternal sustained smoking during pregnancy is associated with thousands of differentially methylated CpGs in newborns, but impacts of other prenatal tobacco smoking exposures remain unclear.: To identify differential DNA methylation in newborns from maternal sustained smoking and less studied prenatal smoking exposures (i.e., maternal exposure to secondh...
